edition.dagbeeld: De crisis rond de Straat van Hormuz escaleert verder: nieuwe Amerikaanse aanvallen op Iraanse eilanden, terwijl Teheran onderhandelingen afwijst en de oliemarkten onder druk staan. Tegelijk rommelt het aan meerdere fronten: SpaceX keldert op de beurs, de Franse euthanasiewet is aangenomen en de Democraten in de VS breken over steun aan Israël.

article.title: U.S. Strikes Hit Greater Tunb Island in Strait of Hormuz
article.summary: The U.S. military said on Wednesday it had attacked Iranian cruise missile storage and launch sites on Greater Tunb, one of several small islands in the Strait of Hormuz subject to a decades-old territorial dispute.

opening.note: VS bombardeert Iraans eiland in Hormuzstraat — nieuw front in snel escalerende crisis.
opening.label: breaking

article.title: Our Top Editor on Subpoenas of Times Journalists
article.summary: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to reporters who wrote about security concerns involving the new Air Force One. Joe Kahn, the executive editor of The New York Times, responds to what he calls a “naked attempt to intimidate” the newspaper.
